text:

title: Prior predictive checks
text:
library(bayesplot)
library(brms)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(targets)
Below is the structure of the data frame used to perform prior predictive checks:
df <- tar_read(df_prior_checks)
str(df, give.attr = FALSE)

tibble [53 × 13] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
 $ Threat                  : num [1:53] 0.249 0.249 0.249 1.076 -0.229 ...
 $ Deprivation             : num [1:53] 0.694 -0.185 0.274 0.694 0.942 ...
 $ Unpredictability        : num [1:53] 1.077 0.358 0.358 -0.36 0.358 ...
 $ CRS                     : num [1:53] 0.6788 0.0596 0.1624 0.5262 0.5778 ...
 $ Anxiety                 : num [1:53] -0.294 -0.243 0.016 -0.135 -0.476 ...
 $ Depression              : num [1:53] 0.608 -0.461 -0.682 1.124 -0.913 ...
 $ ICSF                    : num [1:53] -0.1092 0.0911 -0.1343 0.0536 -0.0126 ...
 $ EstimatedAgeArrivalGroup: chr [1:53] "3y-8y (adolescence)" "0m-14m (infancy)" "14m-36m (juvenility)" "3y-8y (adolescence)" ...
 $ EstimatedAgeArrival     : num [1:53, 1] 0.595 -0.484 0.206 0.964 -0.797 ...
 $ YearsCenter             : num [1:53, 1] 0.00946 -0.99282 -1.01754 -0.70517 -0.67596 ...
 $ Species_2               : chr [1:53] "Macaca_leonina" "Macaca_assamensis" "Macaca_assamensis" "Macaca_mulatta" ...
 $ Sex_2                   : chr [1:53] "female" "male" "male" "female" ...
 $ ConfigurationName       : chr [1:53] "P4" "P4" "P10" "P6" ...

title: Prior predictive checks
section: Model 1A (dimensional approach): Association between early-life adversity predictors and behavioural outcomes
text:
Model 1A (dimensional approach): Association between early-life adversity predictors and behavioural outcomes

prior_checks_1A <- tar_read(fit_prior_1A)
pp_check(prior_checks_1A, resp = "Anxiety", ndraws = 50) + 
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Model 1A: Prior Predictive Check (Anxiety)")







pp_check(prior_checks_1A, resp = "Depression", ndraws = 50) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Model 1A: Prior Predictive Check (Depression)")







pp_check(prior_checks_1A, resp = "ICSF", ndraws = 50) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Model 1A: Prior Predictive Check (ICSF)")

title: Prior predictive checks
section: Model 1B (cumulative risk approach): Association between early-life adversity predictor and behavioural outcomes
text:

pp_check(prior_checks_1B, resp = "ICSF", ndraws = 50) +
